{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/tags/0.0.0/assets/cubyz/items/textures/ruby.png
|durability=300
|mass_damage=0.9
|hardness_damage=8.5
|swing_speed=4.5
|tags=N/A
|modifiers=fragile
}}


== Properties ==
{{Stub|section}}

== Obtaining ==
{{Stub|section}}

== Usage ==
{{Stub|section}}

== History ==

* [[0.0.0]] - Added to the game

== Trivia ==
